mapper.select: SELECT DATE(create_time) AS date, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM order_master WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date

SELECT r.rider_id, r.name, r.phone, r.today_order_count, r.credit_score, COUNT(om.order_id) AS total_order_count, IFNULL(ROUND(AVG(c.score), 1), 0) AS avg_score FROM rider r LEFT JOIN order_master om ON r.rider_id = om.delivery_id AND om.order_status IN (4,6) LEFT JOIN comment c ON c.order_id = LEFT(om.order_id, LOCATE('_', om.order_id)-1) GROUP BY r.rider_id, r.name, r.phone, r.today_order_count, r.credit_score ORDER BY total_order_count DESC, avg_score DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_after_sale, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE score < 3) AS bad_comment_count FROM after_sale

SELECT DATE(pay_time) AS date, SUM(pay_money) AS daily_income, SUM(delivery_fee) AS delivery_fee_income FROM order_master WHERE pay_time IS NOT NULL AND pay_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(pay_time) ORDER BY date

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_master) AS total_order, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(pay_money), 0) FROM order_master WHERE pay_time IS NOT NULL) AS total_income, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM after_sale WHERE status = 0) AS pending_complaint, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rider WHERE work_status = 1) AS online_rider_count FROM DUAL
